title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Sheriff Butler expresses his desire to cooperate with Anthony, whom he views as a capable amateur detective. During their conversation, Anthony inquires about the succession of Prince Michael’s legacy. Detective Batterton reveals that Prince Michael's cousin, Prince Nikolai Ovaryevich, is the next in line for the throne and is currently in the United States raising funds. From this, Anthony deduces that Prince Michael's death has created a geopolitical conflict regarding oil rights between British-supported Royalists and American-supported interests, involving George Rokhmats and Azerbaijani companies.

Following the discussion, Anthony visits a classroom and meets a middle-aged teacher named Miss White, though he feels foolish because she does not match his preconceived image of a famous adventurer. That night, a tall, muscular man named Boris Anschutz enters Anthony's room. Boris identifies himself as Prince Michael's former personal servant and declares his intention to serve Anthony for life, despite Anthony's refusal and his claim that he cannot afford a servant.

The next morning, an autopsy is conducted on Prince Michael, facilitated by Chief Constable Batterton and a coroner. After the examination, Anthony departs Chimney House. Later that night, Virginia wakes Bill Everleigh from a dream, telling him she heard a loud bang and saw strange lights in the hall. Concerned by these bizarre occurrences, Virginia urges Bill to investigate the situation.
